description: Track folder for cli-external-orchestration packets — the external-CLI orchestration skill family (cli-codex, cli-claude-code, cli-opencode, cli-gemini, cli-devin, cli-copilot) plus their model-support and deprecation history. Hosts spec folders 001-028 covering CLI creation, provider + model optimization (minimax, mimo, kimi, glm), self-invocation guards, testing playbooks, skill patterns, tone/prompting, deprecations, the cli-external parent hub, codex revival, and the cli hub rename.
